steps.title: Support artistic change
steps.content: The student's claim is that The Horse Fair marks a significant change in Bonheur's artistic development. The strongest quotation must show a shift from earlier work to a later style or direction.

steps.title: Reject praise without change
steps.content:
• Choice B: It praises the painting but does not show a development shift.
  • Choice C: It concerns varied interpretations, not Bonheur's artistic development.
  • Choice D: It says Bonheur was ahead of her time but does not show a change within her work.
The answer is A.
